description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist, boxy design. The exterior is clad in dark panels, contrasted by large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. A prominent driveway leads to the main entrance, which is set beneath a simple overhang. The property features a separate pool area with lounge chairs, surrounded by tall, slender palm trees that add a tropical ambiance. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall layout is open and geometric, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark exterior panels, large asymmetrical windows, and a separate pool area surrounded by palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and several large windows, with palm trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, the house's boxy profile, and the adjacent pool area with lounge chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool area, multiple windows, and the geometric layout of the house and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, the pool from a distance, and the arrangement of palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, simple door, and a straight driveway approach, minimal decorative elements.
